## Runtime.Indexers.RecipeResolver type

Recipe resolver function type. Provided by RuntimeContext to resolve recipe IDs to entities.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type RecipeResolver = (id: FillingId) => Result<IRuntimeFillingRecipe>;
```
